effect.description: The blue box is inset from the left by half the badge width so the badge's outer half has room; everything else stays full content width.

quotes: the callout sits on the page/section background (usually White `#ffffff`)
The blue box itself is **inset from the left by half the badge width** so the badge's outer half has room
Everything else stays full content width.

effect.prohibition: Never simplify either to a single uniform radius, swap the corners, or flip the diagonal.

quotes: Never simplify either to a single uniform radius, swap the corners, or flip the diagonal.

effect.requirement: The white icon badge must carry a subtle drop shadow on every instance so it lifts off the blue box; without it the badge looks flat and pasted-on.

quotes: the white icon badge **must carry a subtle drop shadow** so it lifts off the blue box
This shadow is required on every instance; without it the badge looks flat and pasted-on.
the **left padding must clear the overhanging badge half plus a gap** (? `W/2 + 24px`)
the **left padding must clear the overhanging badge half plus a gap** (? `W/2 + 24px`)
the white icon badge **must carry a subtle drop shadow** so it lifts off the blue box
